aca_ratio_pd_per_d.desc: Behavioural AC/A ratio (Δvergence pd ÷ Δaccommodation D)

aca_vergence_delta.desc: Extra convergence from AC/A (lens-driven vergence, on − off)

acc_darkfocus_adapt.desc: Tonic-accommodation (dark focus) adaptation after 32 s near (open-loop residual, near-conditioned − far control). Physiological near-induced dark-focus shift ≈ 0.1–0.6 D.

acc_darkfocus_tc_s.desc: Dark-hold persistence TC of the adapted dark focus (Hung target ~15–20 s).

acc_step_latency_ms.desc: Accommodation step latency (demand step → 10% of response)

fcp_gaze_amp.desc: Peak horizontal eye position at the 30° gaze targets

fcp_nerve_pullonly_frac.desc: Fraction of per-muscle nerve samples ≥ 0 — pull-only co-contraction invariant

fcp_verg_far.desc: Ocular vergence at far target (4 m; geometric 0.9°)

fcp_verg_near.desc: Ocular vergence at near target (0.25 m; geometric 14.6°)

fix_drift_rms.desc: Fixational drift (eye-position std) with all noise sources on

fix_microsaccade_rate.desc: Microsaccade rate (burst events/s) in the all-noise condition

fix_noiseless_drift_std.cite: numerical sanity (noise-off stability; no physiological band)
fix_noiseless_drift_std.desc: Eye-position std with all noise off (should be ≈0 — stability sanity)

gravity_ocr_gain.desc: OCR amplitude ratio: measured SS torsion ÷ −G_OCR·G0·sin(θ)

gravity_ocr_sin_rmse.desc: RMS deviation of SS torsion from the expected sine law across tilts

gravity_ovar_bias_10.desc: OVAR steady-state average SPV (screw/translation bias) at 10° tilt

gravity_ovar_bias_30.desc: OVAR steady-state average SPV (screw/translation bias) at 30° tilt

gravity_ovar_bias_60.desc: OVAR steady-state average SPV (screw/translation bias) at 60° tilt

gravity_ovar_bias_90.desc: OVAR steady-state average SPV (screw/translation bias) at 90° tilt

gravity_ovar_mod_10.desc: OVAR SPV modulation amplitude at 10° tilt (∝ sin tilt)

gravity_ovar_mod_30.desc: OVAR SPV modulation amplitude at 30° tilt (∝ sin tilt)

gravity_ovar_mod_60.desc: OVAR SPV modulation amplitude at 60° tilt (∝ sin tilt)

gravity_ovar_mod_90.desc: OVAR SPV modulation amplitude at 90° tilt (∝ sin tilt)

gravity_tilt_reversal_60.desc: Sustained late post-rotatory SPV at 60° — reversal / opposite-direction nystagmus

gravity_tilt_reversal_90.desc: Sustained late post-rotatory SPV at 90° — reversal / opposite-direction nystagmus

gravity_tilt_tc_0.desc: Post-rotatory version-SPV decay TC at 0° post-stop tilt

gravity_tilt_tc_30.desc: Post-rotatory version-SPV decay TC at 30° post-stop tilt

gravity_tilt_tc_60.desc: Post-rotatory version-SPV decay TC at 60° post-stop tilt

gravity_tilt_tc_90.desc: Post-rotatory version-SPV decay TC at 90° post-stop tilt

listing_halfangle_slope.desc: Half-angle rule: measured/predicted torsion slope (1.0 = ideal)

listing_ocr_torsion_err.desc: Residual torsion error after the OCR-correction saccade

listing_plane_rmse.desc: Listing's-plane thickness: RMS torsion deviation from the half-angle prediction

listing_pursuit_rmse.desc: Listing error RMS during pursuit (torsion vs half-angle demand)

pursuit_latency_ms.desc: Pursuit onset latency at 10 deg/s (ramp onset → SPV > 2 deg/s)

pursuit_ss_gain_10degs.desc: Steady-state pursuit gain at 10 deg/s ramp

pursuit_ss_gain_5degs.desc: Steady-state pursuit gain (SPV ÷ target vel) at 5 deg/s ramp

sac_cascade_count_noiseless.desc: WORST-amplitude saccade count per noiseless target step — must be 1 (clean) or 2 (primary + 1 corrective); >2 ⇒ burst oscillating / mis-terminating

sac_mainseq_resid_max.desc: Max fractional deviation from 700(1−e^−A/7), amplitudes ≥5° (the idealized curve over-predicts small saccades, so ~20% at 5° is expected)

sac_oblique_straightness.cite: Smit et al. (1990); van Gisbergen et al. (1985)
sac_oblique_straightness.desc: Max trajectory curvature (perp dev ÷ amplitude) over oblique directions

sac_peak_vel_20deg.desc: Peak velocity of a 20° saccade (main-sequence saturation)

sac_postsac_peak_long_noiseless.desc: WORST-amplitude PEAK slow-phase speed in the LONG hold window — sustained post-saccadic oscillation/drift (noiseless target ~0)

sac_postsac_peak_short_noiseless.desc: WORST-amplitude PEAK slow-phase speed in the SHORT window just after the saccade — immediate ring/glissade (noiseless target ~0)

sac_postsac_verg_peak_noiseless.desc: WORST-amplitude PEAK post-saccadic vergence (L−R) velocity — the per-eye MN/MLF glissade asymmetry the version metric averages away (Side 2; target ~0)

sac_refractory_isi_median_ms.desc: Median across amplitudes of the per-amplitude refractory-ISI threshold

sac_refractory_isi_ms.desc: Smallest double-step ISI yielding a distinct 2nd saccade (A=20°)

tvor_bode_gain_max_dark.desc: tVOR peak gain vs geometric ideal (high-f plateau) — dark

tvor_bode_gain_max_scene.desc: tVOR peak gain vs geometric ideal (high-f plateau) — scene

tvor_bode_gain_max_scene_target.desc: tVOR peak gain vs geometric ideal (high-f plateau) — scene+target

tvor_torsion_cross_dark.desc: Cross-axis torsion amplitude at 1 Hz during lateral translation — dark

tvor_torsion_cross_scene.desc: Cross-axis torsion amplitude at 1 Hz during lateral translation — scene

tvor_torsion_cross_scene_target.desc: Cross-axis torsion amplitude at 1 Hz during lateral translation — scene+target

verg_asym_facilitation.desc: Zee SVBN facilitation: asymmetric ÷ symmetric peak vergence velocity

verg_conv_div_ratio.cite: Zee et al. (1992); Collewijn et al. (1988)
verg_conv_div_ratio.desc: Symmetric peak-velocity ratio convergence ÷ divergence (>1 expected)

verg_phoria_adapt.desc: Tonic-vergence (phoria) adaptation after 32 s near (open-loop residual, near-conditioned − far control). Physiological retained phoria ≈ a few Δ (~0.3–3°); current model over-retains (cross-coupled AC/A holds convergence).

verg_phoria_tc_s.desc: Dark-hold persistence TC of the adapted phoria (Hung target ~15–20 s). A railed value (≥~150 s) means vergence does NOT relax in the dark — AC/A keeps converting the still-wound accommodation tonic into convergence.

verg_sym_conv_err.desc: Steady-state vergence error vs geometric target (convergence)

verg_sym_version_leak.desc: Max |version| during symmetric vergence (conjugacy — should be ≈0)

vor_bode_fc_lo_light_target.desc: VOR low-side −3 dB corner (canal high-pass) — light+target

vor_okr_okan_tc.desc: OKAN SPV decay time constant after scene off (~tau_vs)

vor_okr_okn_ss_gain.desc: OKN steady-state SPV gain (last 10 s of scene-on)

vor_okr_postrot_tc.desc: VOR post-rotatory SPV decay time constant (VS-extended)

vor_okr_vvor_gain.desc: VVOR slow-phase gain during rotation in light (10–25 s)
